detailed_explanation: The polite copula. Used to end sentences with nouns and な-adjectives in polite speech.

usage_examples.reading: わたしはがくせいです

nuance_notes: です makes speech polite. Use with strangers, teachers, bosses. Friends use だ instead. Past tense: でした. Negative: ではありません/じゃありません.
common_mistakes: Using です with い-adjectives (×美味しいです is actually correct polite form, but 美味しいだ is wrong). Use です after い-adjectives too in polite speech.

detailed_explanation: Polite verb ending. Changes dictionary form verbs to polite/formal speech.
nuance_notes: ます attaches to verb stem. 行く→行きます. 食べる→食べます. Past: ました. Negative: ません. Makes verbs polite/formal.
common_mistakes: Wrong stem: 話す→話します (correct, not 話すます). Group 1 verbs change: 行く→行きます, 読む→読みます. Group 2: drop る only: 食べる→食べます.
